---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the situation where you needed this.

## Proposed solution

How should sir handle this? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is the proposed solution better?

## Scope check

Before submitting, please check that this feature is not in sir's "What NOT to Build" list:

- [ ] This is NOT: strict mode, projected workspaces, or mister-apply
- [ ] This is NOT: MCP server/gateway functionality
- [ ] This is NOT: Bash AST parsing beyond prefix matching
- [ ] This is NOT: update/signing infrastructure beyond SHA-256
- [ ] This is NOT: new adapters beyond Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Codex (community-driven)
- [ ] This is NOT: control plane, dashboard, or fleet management

If your feature is in the "NOT to build" list, it may still be valuable -- but it is out of scope for v1. Open an issue describing the use case and why it belongs beyond the current scope.

## Impact

Who benefits from this feature?

- [ ] Individual developers using Claude Code
- [ ] Security teams deploying sir across an org
- [ ] Contributors to the sir project
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples.
